creator: newuse@mail2linux.com
text: I have just tested with IC BCM5721(FW: 3.65), also bge  driver, and it is working just fine, seems that it is IC or FW specific, I could try to test with latest FreeBSD version, but it there where no changes for a long time in src code of bge driver in this part. Could you, please test if there where any changes in latest IC FW, and could you provide latest FW for BCM5704 based card?
